name: wikipedia-quick-search
description: Sichere Wikipedia-Browsererweiterung: markierten Text per Alt+W/Option+W im Side Panel nachschlagen. Ohne LLM, ohne Tracking, ohne eigenen Server.

scripts.build:all: node scripts/build.mjs chromium && node scripts/build.mjs firefox && node scripts/build.mjs safari
scripts.package:chromium: node scripts/build.mjs chromium && node scripts/package.mjs chromium
scripts.package:firefox: node scripts/build.mjs firefox && node scripts/package.mjs firefox
scripts.package:safari: node scripts/build.mjs safari && node scripts/package.mjs safari
